definition: Age of the patient in whole years at the time of evaluation.
synonyms: age | years old | elderly | senior | pediatric

definition: Patient gender as recorded in the clinical record.
Glycated hemoglobin percentage — measures average blood glucose over the preceding 3 months.
synonyms: A1C | glycated hemoglobin | hemoglobin A1c | blood sugar control | glycohemoglobin
bad cholesterol | LDL | low density lipoprotein | LDL-C
good cholesterol | HDL | high density lipoprotein | HDL-C

definition: Fasting blood glucose level measured after at least 8 hours without food.
synonyms: blood sugar | glucose level | fasting blood sugar | FBS

definition: Peak arterial pressure during a heartbeat.
synonyms: upper blood pressure | top number | systolic pressure | SBP
lower blood pressure | bottom number | diastolic pressure | DBP

definition: Body mass index derived from height and weight (kg/m²).
synonyms: BMI | weight index | body weight index | obesity index

definition: Resting heart rate in beats per minute.
synonyms: pulse | resting pulse | heart rate | HR | BPM

definition: Composite risk score (0–100) estimating likelihood of adverse clinical outcomes within 12 months.
synonyms: risk stratification | patient risk | health risk score | care risk

definition: Indicates an active Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes diagnosis on the patient's problem list.
synonyms: diabetic | diabetes | T1D | T2D | type 1 diabetes | type 2 diabetes | DM

definition: Indicates an active hypertension diagnosis on the patient's problem list.
synonyms: high blood pressure | hypertension | HTN | elevated blood pressure

definition: Indicates the patient is meeting the prescribed medication adherence threshold.
synonyms: adherence | medication compliance | drug adherence | taking medications

definition: ICD-10-CM primary diagnosis code recorded at the most recent encounter.
synonyms: ICD code | diagnosis code | primary condition | chief complaint

definition: Type of insurance coverage active for the patient.
synonyms: plan type | coverage type | insurance | payer type | plan

definition: Date of the patient's most recent clinical encounter with any provider.
synonyms: last appointment | last visit | most recent visit | last seen
